roleDescriptions.Admin: Full access to manage team, settings, and data
roleDescriptions.Manager: Manages couriers and views performance reports
roleDescriptions.Supervisor: Upload data and access courier reports
roleDescriptions.Viewer: Read-only access to reports and data

notifications.heading: Notification Settings
notifications.subheading: Control when and how you receive alerts
notifications.inAppDesc: Instant alerts in the NEXUS interface
notifications.emailDesc: Daily digest and urgent alerts to your inbox
notifications.smsDesc: Critical alerts only via your phone number
notifications.warningThresholdDesc: When a courier exceeds the allowed number of violations
notifications.commitmentDropDesc: When the rate drops below the SLA threshold
notifications.autoDeactivateDesc: When automatic suspension is applied due to violations
notifications.importSuccessDesc: When a CSV or Excel file import is completed
notifications.importFailureDesc: When an error occurs in the imported data format
notifications.weeklyReportDesc: When the automated weekly report is generated
notifications.slaReminderDesc: Monthly reminder to review service level objectives

sla.subtitle: Set the target and minimum for each indicator — couriers are evaluated against them

settings.securitySubtitle: Protect your account and manage login sessions
settings.newPasswordHint: At least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, and a number
settings.confirmPasswordHint: At least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, and a number
settings.enable2faDesc: Extra security when logging in via the authenticator app
settings.smsVerificationDesc: Send a verification code to your registered phone number
settings.passwordsDoNotMatch: New password and confirm password do not match.
settings.genericError: Something went wrong, please try again.
settings.confirmTerminateCurrent: Are you sure you want to end your current session? You will be logged out.
settings.confirmTerminateAll: Are you sure you want to end all sessions? You will be logged out from all devices.
settings.errorTerminate: Failed to end session. Please try again.
